upasargachandrika.example_text: 'cikitsAprABfto DImAn SAstravAn karmatatparaH' (caraka0 sUtra0 1629) cikitsA prABftamasya prABftamityupAyanaM Bavati
'evaM vA eza yajYaM samBarati yo dIkzate' (Sa॰brA॰3.2.2.3) samBarati=sagfhRAti
'evaM devatA agre yajYaM samaBaran' (Sa॰brA॰12.7.3.6) yajYasamBArAn kftavanta ityarTaH
'devA vE praTamenAhnendrAya vanaM samaBaran' (E॰brA॰4.1) praTamAhasampAdyena somena vajraM samaBaran vajraM kartuM prakftidravyaM samAnayan ityAha
'vAlEH SfNgeRa pAdena samBaratyeva gOrmaKam' (BA॰SAM॰263.38) samBArAn sampAdayati
'praviSyEkAkinEvATa drazwavyaH samBfto mayA' (sariduttaraRopAyaH) (rAja॰4.572) samBftaH=sajjIkftaH nirmita iti vA
'samBftya mahatIM senAM caturaNgAM yuDizWira' (BA॰Adi॰102.16) samBftya ekIkftyetyarTaH
'samBftA cEva vidyeyaM tapaseha mayA purA' (BA॰Adi॰170.41) samBftA=arjitA
'te ca syuH samBftAH sarve vasuBirBojanena ca' (rA॰1.13.15) samBftAH=pUrRAH ye syuH sampUjitA iti pAWAntaram
'paYcaDA samBftaH kAyo yadi paYcatvamAgataH karmaBiH svaSarIrotTEstatra kA paridevanA' (yAjYa॰3.9).. samBfto nirmitaH
'kaccitte samBftA BftyAH kaccittizWanti SAsane' (rA॰1.52.8) samBftAH=vetanadAnAdinA puzwAH
'samBftvA nAma yo devaH' (aTarva॰3.24.2) samBftvA=samBartA BfYaH kvanip maDukaravatsArAMSasya saNgrahItetyarTaH
'tasmA etAmAsandIM samaBaran' (E0 brA0 812) samaBaran niramimata nirmitavantaH
'dakziRena pavanena samBftaM prekzya cUtakusumaM sapallavan' (raGu0 1943) saMBftaM janitam
'paYcaDA saMBftaH kAyo yadi paYcatvamAgataH karmaBiSca SarIrasTEstatra kA paridevanA' (go0 smf0 342) saMBfto nirmitaH karmaBiH svaSarIrotTEriti yAjYavalkyasmftipAWo jyAyAn
'pratizWatyezA hi saMsAre saMBftAGavinASinI' (mArka0 24542) saMBftaM puYjIkftam rASIkftam
'saMBArAH Kalu te'nya eva viDinA yEreza sfzwo yuvA' (kA0 pra0 7219) saMBArAH kAraRakalApaH upakaraRajAtam
'tajjahIhi raRAramBadamBa-saMBAramaYjasA' (parijAta0 1326) samBAro BAro Baro'tiSayaH atrArTe samSabdaM na prayuYjate kavaya ityasTAna evAyam
'yaTA maDu maDukftaH saMBaranti yaTAviDi' (aTarva0 9116) saMBaranti saMharanti samAharanti
'aBavad vyaBramAkASamaBUcca niBfto'rRavaH' (hari0 21624) niBftaH pUrRaH ihAnupacarito DAtvarTaH ktAnte niSabdo niHSezatAM sAkalyaM kArtsnyamAha
'ko'yaM niBftaM tapovanamidaM grAmI karotyAjYayA' (svapna0 1) niBftaM nIravaM praSAntam
'nizkampavfkzaM niBftadvirePaM… tatkAnanam' (ku0 342) niBftA viratavirutA vigatasvanAH SAntA dvirePAH zawpadA yatra tat
'vAriDIniva yugAntavAyavaH kzoBayantyaniBftA gurUnapi' (ki0 1363) aniBftA raMhasvanto vegavantaH pravicalAH
'tayA vyAhftasandeSA sA baBO niBftA priye' (ku0 62) niBftA dfQaniScayA sTiramanAH
'SiroBirniBftAcAra mahIpatanapAMsulEH' (rA0 24527) he niScalaDarmAnuzWAneti vivakzati niScalamaviSramaM DarmAcaraRamasyetyarTaH
'niBftamiti cintanIyaM SIGramiti sukaram' (SA0 4) rahasyaM yaTA syAttaTA karaRIyaM ceccintanIyaM BavedityarTaH
'atrEvAyamarTo dfzwo netaratretyasya parigrahe'naDyavasAyo naH tezAM tatrAviDeyAnAM niBftAnAM mahAtmanAm' (BA0 vi0 275) niBftAnAmatyantAvahitAnAmiti nIlakaRWaH
'pInaSroRi gaBIranABi niBftaM maDye BfSoccastanam pAyAdvaH parirabDamabDiduhituH kAntena kAntaM vapuH' (sarasvatI0 315)..
'DftyA ca puruzavyAGro nEBftyena ca pARqavaH' (BA0 u0 5310) nEBftyena mantraguptyA
'guruvAtsalyamatyantaM nEBftyaM vinayo damaH' (BA0 droRa0 346) nEBftyaM kftakartavyA'prakASanam
'anena dattAni vanIyakezu BuktASca BogA niBftASca BftyAH' (rA0 610922) niBftA nitarAM pozitA BaktAdidAnena
'taTABUtAM dfzwvA… virAwasyAvAse sTitamanucitAraBBaniBftam' (veRI0 111).. niBftamavarudDaM pracCannam AkArasaMvftyA
